data.title: 国际服热补丁修复

data.body:
[4/8 Data Patch Notice]

We will be having a quick data patch (hotfix) on 4/8 (Wed).
The game will be accessible during the patch. A patch download will be required upon reconnecting after the work is completed.

The patch will be applied once you reconnect to the game after 6:05 AM (UTC)

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=3419316&allBoard=1
